title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Kyoshiro, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Nami, Orochi as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: K'HAA AAAAH!! BIG SISH! BIG SISH!

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: Why did you do that, boss Kyoshiro!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The most beautiful woman in the Wano Country... What a pity...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who gave you permission to kill her!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter who it is... when some- one stands up to the Shogun, they've committed a serious crime!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did he do it to prove his loyalty....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe Kyo- Shiro would do something so extreme....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That child!! I'm gonna chew her to pieces!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, stop! The castle will be destroyed at this rate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you hadn't laughed at me, none of this would have happened!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hand over the girl, O-Rob!! And you better tell me who you are, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Heeeeey, did ya call for me!? Nami-!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh!? Is he not going to attack us!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now's not the time to worry about some vengeful spirit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should head back that way soon, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's been an incident in the banquet Hall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Capture the intruders!! Exercise the ghosts!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I don't know what I was doing," said the

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
